title: ACAS certificate
legend: Do you have an ACAS certificate number for the respondent?
acasCertNum: Enter an ACAS early conciliation certificate number
hintText: Nearly everyone should have this number before they fill in a claim form. You can find it on the ACAS certificate. Read more about the
linkText: ACAS early conciliation service (opens in new tab)

acasCert.required: Tell us if you have an ACAS early conciliation number for the respondent

acasCertNum.required: Tell us if you have an ACAS early conciliation number for the respondent
acasCertNum.invalidAcasNumber: Enter ACAS number in the correct format. For example R123456/12/34
